accepted_edits.note: Aggressively reduce dominance of approach region to discourage loitering.
Boost reward for high-quality landings to align with task goal.
Increase stability reward to maintain safe attitude during descent.
Provide a strong one-time bonus when both legs touch ground, incentivizing landing completion.

reports.reason: Event rule r_both_contact_bonus has non-zero estimated trigger signal on current rollouts.
